languages.text: "Борьба, стремление быть наверху пищевой цепочки. Понятный ответ. Но в корне этого стремления лежит еще одно, более примитивное".
"Struggling, striving to be at the top of the food chain. An understandable answer. But at the root of that urge lies another, more primitive one."
languages.original_text: "Борьба, стремление быть наверху пищевой цепочки. Понятный ответ. Но в корне этого стремления лежит еще одно, более примитивное".

traits.locale_text: "Struggling, striving to be at the top of the food chain. An understandable answer. But at the root of that urge lies another, more primitive one."
"Struggling, striving to be at the top of the food chain. An understandable answer. But at the root of that urge lies another, more primitive one."
"Struggling, striving to be at the top of the food chain. An understandable answer. But at the root of that urge lies another, more primitive one."

languages.text: 「生き残るために、食物連鎖の頂点に立つために努力する。それは理解できる答えだ。しかし、その根底には、もっと原始的な欲求がある」
languages.original_text: "Struggling, striving to be at the top of the food chain. An understandable answer. But at the root of that urge lies another, more primitive one."

traits.locale_text: 「生き残るために、食物連鎖の頂点に立つために努力する。それは理解できる答えだ。しかし、その根底には、もっと原始的な欲求がある。」

languages.text: “挣扎求生，奋力站上食物链的顶端。我能理解这种想法。但在这种冲动的根源处，潜藏着另一种更为原始的本能。”
languages.original_text: "Struggling, striving to be at the top of the food chain. An understandable answer. But at the root of that urge lies another, more primitive one."

traits.locale_text: “挣扎求生，奋力站上食物链的顶端。我能理解这种想法。但在这种冲动的根源处，潜藏着另一种更为原始的本能。”

languages.text: «La lucha por llegar a la cumbre de la cadena alimentaria. Una respuesta comprensible, pero en ella se oculta otra necesidad, más primitiva».
languages.original_text: "Struggling, striving to be at the top of the food chain. An understandable answer. But at the root of that urge lies another, more primitive one."

traits.locale_text: «La lucha por llegar a la cumbre de la cadena alimentaria. Una respuesta comprensible, pero en ella se oculta otra necesidad, más primitiva».

languages.text: "Der Kampf um die Spitze der Nahrungskette. Eine verständliche Antwort. Aber dem liegt ein anderer, primitiverer Wunsch zugrunde."
languages.original_text: "Struggling, striving to be at the top of the food chain. An understandable answer. But at the root of that urge lies another, more primitive one."

traits.locale_text: "Der Kampf um die Spitze der Nahrungskette. Eine verständliche Antwort. Aber dem liegt ein anderer, primitiverer Wunsch zugrunde."

languages.text: « Lutter pour grimper au sommet de la chaîne alimentaire. Une réponse compréhensible, mais cette nécessité découle d'un autre besoin plus primitif. »
languages.original_text: "Struggling, striving to be at the top of the food chain. An understandable answer. But at the root of that urge lies another, more primitive one."

traits.locale_text: « Lutter pour grimper au sommet de la chaîne alimentaire. Une réponse compréhensible, mais cette nécessité découle d'un autre besoin plus primitif. »

languages.text: "Mücadele etmek, besin zincirinin en tepesinde olmak için çabalamak. Anlaşılabilir bir cevap. Ancak bu dürtünün kökeninde daha ilkel başka bir dürtü yatıyor."
languages.original_text: "Struggling, striving to be at the top of the food chain. An understandable answer. But at the root of that urge lies another, more primitive one."

traits.locale_text: "Mücadele etmek, besin zincirinin en tepesinde olmak için çabalamak. Anlaşılabilir bir cevap. Ancak bu dürtünün kökeninde daha ilkel başka bir dürtü yatıyor."
